name: Claude Opus 4.1
tagline: Incremental upgrade to Opus 4 with improved coding and agentic performance.
metaDescription: Claude Opus 4.1 (Anthropic), released 2025-08-05 — part of the Claude Opus line. Incremental upgrade to Opus 4 with improved coding and agentic performance.
overview: Claude Opus 4.1 is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude Opus line. Released 2025-08-05. Anthropic's flagship Claude tier — most capable Opus-class model for the hardest reasoning, coding, and long-horizon agentic work.
What's notable in this version: Incremental upgrade to Opus 4 with improved coding and agentic performance.
